escalation_ladder.1: AWARENESS — First time: Educational content. No deduction.
escalation_ladder.2: GENTLE NUDGE — Second time: Community impact data shown. No deduction.
escalation_ladder.3: SOFT CONSEQUENCE — Third time: Points deducted with remediation path.
escalation_ladder.4: COMMUNITY FLAG — Repeated pattern: Elected community moderators involved.
escalation_ladder.5: AUTHORITY ROUTING — Severe/criminal: Auto-routed to police/government with evidence.
